targets.rawSql:
SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, groupUniqArray(profile_id) AS `Profils`, anyLast(mode) AS `Mode`, max(observed_at) AS `Dernier observed_at`, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS `Âge minutes`, sum(decision_count) AS `Décisions`, sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`, sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`, avg(roi) AS `ROI` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY `Dernier observed_at` DESC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series, avg(roi) AS `ROI` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' trades') AS series, sum(trade_count) AS value FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY time, series UNION ALL SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' blocages') AS series, sum(skip_count) AS value FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT observed_at, run_id, market_id, token_id, strategy_id, profile_id, decision_status, skip_reason, edge, limit_price, source_ok, orderbook_ok, risk_ok, blocker FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT market_id AS `Marché`, strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, anyLast(edge) AS `Edge`, anyLast(limit_price) AS `Limit price`, anyLast(source_ok) AS `Source OK`, anyLast(orderbook_ok) AS `Orderbook OK`, anyLast(risk_ok) AS `Risk OK`, anyLast(blocker) AS `Blocker`, max(observed_at) AS `Dernier observed_at` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY market_id, strategy_id, profile_id ORDER BY `Dernier observed_at` DESC

SELECT observed_at, run_id, market_id, token_id, strategy_id, profile_id, paper_order_id, side, status, price, size, spend_usdc, paper_only, live_order_allowed FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT observed_at, run_id, market_id, token_id, strategy_id, profile_id, execution_event_id, event_type, mode, paper_only, live_order_allowed, raw FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT p.observed_at AS `Paper observed_at`, p.run_id AS `Run`, p.market_id AS `Marché`, p.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, p.profile_id AS `Profil`, p.paper_order_id AS `Ordre paper`, p.status AS `Statut paper`, p.price AS `Prix paper`, p.size AS `Taille paper` FROM prediction_core.paper_orders p WHERE $__timeFilter(p.observed_at) ORDER BY p.observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Comparaison paper / live pour cette stratégie

targets.rawSql:
SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, if(blocker = '', skip_reason, blocker) AS `Raison`, count() AS `Nombre` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) AND (blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id, `Raison` ORDER BY `Nombre` DESC

SELECT observed_at, strategy_id, profile_id, market_id, raw FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, enabled AS `Activée`, mode AS `Mode configuré`, allow_live AS `Live autorisé config`, settings AS `Configuration`, observed_at AS `Dernière config`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id) AS `API config`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/enable') AS `API activer`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/disable') AS `API désactiver`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/mode') AS `API mode` FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs FINAL WHERE match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}') ORDER BY observed_at DESC
